name: Update time on edit

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Adds setting to use numeric date properties by @ygormutti in https://github.com/beaussan/update-time-on-edit-obsidian/pull/67
* Fix broken canvas creation by @RandomSpaceship in https://github.com/beaussan/update-time-on-edit-obsidian/pull/63

## New Contributors
* @ygormutti made their first contribution in https://github.com/beaussan/update-time-on-edit-obsidian/pull/67
* @RandomSpaceship made their first contribution in https://github.com/beaussan/update-time-on-edit-obsidian/pull/63

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/beaussan/update-time-on-edit-obsidian/compare/2.4.0...2.5.0
releases.name: Release 2.5.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## :sparkles: Features
* Add a new experimental hash feature, this means that it will update the file headers only when : 
	* at least 1 minute has passed (or more, defined in the settings)
	* the file content actually changed


This should help with various sync systems ! :tada:


**Always backup your vault**
releases.name: Release 2.4.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:

* Added extra checks to ensure this plugins works well with templater plugins


**Always backup your vault**

releases.name: Release 2.0.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## :sparkles: Features

* Add a warning when the time format includes millisecond


## :bug: Bug fixes
* Ignore excalidraw files, fixes #36
* Handle properly malformed yaml files, fixes #48
* Fix a compatibility issue with templater, fixes #50

**This plugin is still in it's early stage, backup your vault**

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/beaussan/update-time-on-edit-obsidian/compare/2.0.0...2.0.1
releases.name: Release 2.0.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## :sparkles: Features 

* Rely on `ctime` and `mtime` from obsidian & file system instead of guessing the file times, fixes #41 #38  #11 #29 #22 #44
* Support android on mobile ! Fixes #45 #25 


## :bug: Bug fixes
* It will now behave properly when there is a column in a frontmatter, fixes #17 
* Removed log pollution in console.log, fixes #27

## :boom: Breaking change
* Requires Obsidian `v1.1.0` as minimum

**This plugin is still in it's early stage, backup your vault**

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/beaussan/update-time-on-edit-obsidian/compare/1.1.2...2.0.0
releases.name: Release 2.0.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## :bug: Bug fixes
* Fix a issue where the plugin didn't find front matter that don't have a new line after it (thanks @heitor57), #21  

**This plugin is still in it's early stage, backup your vault**
releases.name: Release 1.1.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:

releases.name: Release 1.1.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## :sparkles: Features 

* Allow to disable the create updates, fixes #8 
* Allow to customize the date format, fixes #3 
* Allow for multiple folder to ignore totally
* Allow for only specific folder to ignore the created tag, fixes #5 
* Allow a different read date format than the write one to make transition smoother
* Improve the settings UI

## :bug: Bug fixes
* Now it will behave properly with emoji in the front matter, fixes #9 
* It won't touch any other keys in the front matter, fixes #7 

**This plugin is still in it's early stage, backup your vault**
releases.name: Release 1.1.0

releases.author: beaussan
releases.description: This update improve the way the write are being done
releases.name: Improve the write system
